# HELP kata_hypervisor_fds Number of file descriptors in the hypervisor process
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_fds gauge
kata_hypervisor_fds 42.0
# HELP kata_hypervisor_io_stats_read_bytes Total bytes read by the hypervisor
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_io_stats_read_bytes gauge
kata_hypervisor_io_stats_read_bytes 1.048576e+06
# HELP kata_hypervisor_io_stats_write_bytes Total bytes written by the hypervisor
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_io_stats_write_bytes gauge
kata_hypervisor_io_stats_write_bytes 524288.0
# HELP kata_hypervisor_threads Number of threads in the hypervisor process
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_threads gauge
kata_hypervisor_threads 8.0
# HELP kata_hypervisor_vcpus Number of virtual CPUs allocated to the VM
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_vcpus gauge
kata_hypervisor_vcpus 2.0
# HELP kata_hypervisor_vm_rss_bytes Virtual machine RSS memory in bytes
# TYPE kata_hypervisor_vm_rss_bytes gauge
kata_hypervisor_vm_rss_bytes 5.36870912e+08
